section_order: horizontal discovery tabs with selected tab underline
rounded outlined search field with scan and camera affordances plus orange submit button
high_fidelity_structure.geometry: 390×844 portrait viewport; white content canvas; top tab row is 54px high; search is a 40px pill inset 10px; shortcut grid occupies about 250px with circular/square illustrated icons; promo tiles are three narrow cards in one row; coupon ribbon is 38px with 8px side inset; feed begins below with 8px gutters and two uneven-width visual columns; fixed bottom app navigation is about 76px high.
high_fidelity_structure.dominant_colour_blocks: warm off-white top background; white content cards; vivid orange selected search/action accents; red/pink price labels and coupon ribbon; pale blush promo-card backgrounds; occasional green/purple/yellow shortcut icons; dark charcoal text.
high_fidelity_structure.visual_density: high-density retail dashboard with tightly stacked modules, strong illustrated commerce imagery, bold price/action accents, and minimal whitespace.
high_fidelity_structure.bottom_navigation: visible and fixed; first item is selected with a large orange circular icon; four unselected monochrome icons with labels; cart-style item is a primary entry and notification badge appears over the messages-style item.

replaced_source_assets.brand_and_logo: Replace all marketplace logos and labels with fictional brand 'PoppyMart' and a simple abstract orange loop emblem.
replaced_source_assets.product_photography: Use locally rendered abstract product illustrations: a herb sandwich replaced by a colorful notebook stack, game controller replaced by a teal portable speaker, yellow robot replaced by a coral desk lamp, recommendation photos replaced by a modular toy radio and a minimalist wall clock.
replaced_source_assets.product_names: Use fictional neutral items such as 'PixelPocket Mini Speaker', 'LoopLamp Desk Light', 'Blockwave Charging Hub', and 'Arc Mirror Audio Panel'.
replaced_source_assets.prices: Replace source prices with fictional values such as ¥42, ¥218, ¥136, and ¥319.
replaced_source_assets.source_wording: Replace all Chinese source copy, store names, campaign labels, search query, navigation labels, badges and category names with fictional app wording such as 'Explore', 'Spark', 'Quick Finds', 'Deals', 'Search', 'Claim', and 'PoppyMart'.

components.message: Sunny savings week — up to 18% off

components.purpose: reports current search/filter and action state
adds a recommended item and updates cart count

inferred_interactions.effect: updates selected underline and swaps shortcut/promotional labels or recommendation ordering.
filters the recommendation list and updates qa-result with the active query.
changes the ribbon action to a claimed confirmation and updates visible coupon state.
increments cart-count and changes the corresponding action to added.
changes selected navigation styling; Cart can display the current count.
